top_signals.title: Europe’s Biggest Gas Market Isn’t Setting Aside Enough Winter Fuel
top_signals.summary: Germany’s vast storage sites are less than 30% full, and that’s a concern as the Iran war continues to squeeze supplies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Premarket Movers for May 20, 2026
top_signals.summary: S&P 500 Index futures rise 0.3% as of 7:45 a.m. in New York as investors digest a backdrop of surging rates volatility, heavily crowded semis exposure and euphoric positioning.
